data.biography: 钟汉良，香港影视歌舞四栖艺人。1995年发行首张专辑《OREA》一炮而红，有歌坛“小太阳”之称。曾主演《上海王》、《内线》、《来不及说我爱你》、《天涯明月刀》、《最美的时光》、《十月围城》、《勇士之城》等多部大热电视剧。凭谍战剧《一触即发》中的出色表现成为中国电视金鹰奖打破港台身份限制第一人，获得2012金鹰节观众最喜爱港澳台演员奖。 2014年，其主演的反法西斯战争胜利70周年大型抗战剧《勇士之城》以及年代传奇大剧《十月围城》先后播出，其中《十月围城》入围第三十届电视剧“飞天奖”优秀电视剧奖。 2015年其领衔主演的电视剧《何以笙箫默》引发全民观剧热潮，国民男神形象深入人心。近年来钟汉良转战大银幕，先后参演《毒战》、《捉妖记》、《罗曼蒂克消亡史》等多部影片，其主演的《爱神》、《后会无期》等电影口碑不俗。 2016年，宣布将首次担当导演，执导改编自饶雪漫同名小说的青春爱情电影《沙漏》。其新作杜琪峰导演作品《三人行》、跨国悬疑动作片《惊天大逆转》、动作喜剧大片《赏金猎人》于2016年上映，钟汉良凭借警匪片《三人行》中悍匪张礼信这一角色获得第19届上海国际电影节电影频道传媒关注单元“最受传媒关注男主角” 奖项。
data.name: 钟汉良

data.biography:
鍾漢良，香港影視歌舞四棲藝人。1995 年發行首張專輯《OREA》一炮而紅，有歌壇“小太陽”之稱。曾主演《上海王》、《內線》、《來不及説我愛你》、《天涯明月刀》、《最美的時光》、《十月圍城》、《勇士之城》等多部大熱電視劇。憑諜戰劇《一觸即發》中的出色表現成為中國電視金鷹獎打破港台身份限制第一人，獲得 2012 金鷹節觀眾最喜愛港澳台演員獎。

2014 年，其主演的反法西斯戰爭勝利 70 週年大型抗戰劇《勇士之城》以及年代傳奇大劇《十月圍城》先後播出，其中《十月圍城》入圍第三十屆電視劇“飛天獎”優秀電視劇獎。

2015 年其領銜主演的電視劇《何以笙簫默》引發全民觀劇熱潮，國民男神形象深入人心。近年來鍾漢良轉戰大銀幕，先後參演《毒戰寒流》、《捉妖記》、《羅曼蒂克消亡史》等多部影片，其主演的《愛神》、《後會無期》等電影口碑不俗。

2016 年，宣佈將首次擔當導演，執導改編自饒雪漫同名小説的青春愛情電影《沙漏》。其新作杜琪峯導演作品《三人行》、跨國懸疑動作片《驚天大逆轉》、動作喜劇大片《賞金獵人》於 2016 年上映，鍾漢良憑藉警匪片《三人行》中悍匪張禮信這一角色獲得第 19 屆上海國際電影節電影頻道傳媒關注單元“最受傳媒關注男主角” 獎項。
data.name: 鍾漢良

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia. Claire van der Boom is an Australian film and television actress of Dutch ancestry. Internationally, she is best known for her appearance as Stella in the third episode of the HBO mini-series The Pacific, and her recurring role playing the ex-wife of Det. Danno Williams in the 2010 remake of Hawaii Five-0.

data.biography:
Édesapja holland, édesanyja új-zélandi.Már elég korán kiderült róla, hogy a média az ő világa, ugyanis csak 3 éves volt, mikor először színpadon szerepelt. Egy református női középiskolában tanult, majd a Nemzeti Színművészeti iskolában folytatta tanulmányait. Azóta már több filmben is szerepelt. 2010-ben mellékszerepet kapott a Hawaii Five-0 című sorozatban, ahol Rachel Edwards-ot alakítja.

Claire legelső igazi szerepét 2003-ban kapta meg, a ,,The Shark Net" című ausztrál mozifilmben.  Ekkor azonban még csak kisebb szerpeket kapott, ugyanúgy ahogy 2005-ben a ,,Reflections"-ban is. Ezután már 2007-ben visszatérő szerepet kapott a ,,Love my way" című ausztrál sorozatban, ahol 7 epizódon keresztül Billie szerepében láthatták a TV-nézők. Ugyanebben az évben főszerepet kapott egy ausztrál kisfilben, amelynek címe Katoomba. 2008-ban egy epizódos szerepet kapott az ,,East West 101"-ben, majd még ebben az évben főszereplője lett a ,,The Square" című filmnek. Még ugyanebben az évben kapott szerepet a nagysikerű ausztrál sorozatban, a ,,Rush-A hajsza"-ban, ahol 12 epizódon keresztül szerepelt Grace Berryként. Majd két év kihagyás után, 2010-ben tért vissza. Először ismét egy kisfilmmel, melynek címe ,,Baby Cake". Majd kisebb szerepet kapott a ,,Tough Trade" című mozifilben. Szintén 2010-ben jelentősebb szerepet kapott a ,,Red Hill" című filmben, ahol Alice Coopert alakította.Ezután a ,,The Pacific" című minisorozatban szerepelt A ,,Sister of War" című mozifilben már főszerepet kapott. 2011-ben ismét főszerepet kapott egy ausztrál mozifilben, a ,,Underbelly Files: The Man Who Got Away"-ben. 2011-ben szerepelt még a ,,City Homicide"-ben is, majd ezt követően az "Engine Block" című rövidfilmben láthattuk. 2010-ben szerepet kapott a Hawaii Five 0 című sorozatban, ahol Rachel szerepében láthatjuk, azóta is. 2013-ban a "Record"-ban és a "Master of Sex"-ben játszott, majd ezt követően 2014-ben a Ruth és Alex-ben tűnt fel. Ugyancsak ebben az évben a "Contantine" című sorozatban is láthattuk. Jelenleg több filmje is forgatás alatt van.

data.biography:
Mulvey was born in New Zealand, and is of Maori and European heritage. His family moved to Sydney, Australia when he was eight years old. He is best known for his roles as Mark Moran on the popular Australian drama Underbelly, and as Bogdan 'Draz' Drazic in Heartbreak High. Mulvey attended Beacon Hill High School (New South Wales) along with other Heartbreak High cast members Jon Pollard and Alle Brunning.

Mulvey was injured in a serious car accident in 2003, in a head-on collision at 100 km/h. He was trapped in the vehicle for almost an hour until he could be freed from the wreckage. The midsection of his face collapsed, an incision was made from ear to ear over the top of his scalp, his face "pulled down" and 17 titanium plates were then inserted to repair the fractures to his face and jaw. His left knee and ankle were badly fractured and he lost vision in one eye.
data.name: Callan Mulvey

data.biography: Il est un acteur australien. Sa famille a déménagé à Sydney, en Australie, quand il avait huit ans. Il est surtout connu pour ses rôles de Mark Moran dans le drame australien populaire 'Draz' Drazic dans "Hartley Cœurs à vif". Mulvey a fréquenté le Beacon Hill High School (Nouvelle-Galles du Sud). Mulvey a été blessé dans un grave accident de voiture en 2003, lors d'une collision frontale à 100 km/h. Il a été piégé dans le véhicule pendant près d'une heure jusqu'à ce qu'il puisse être libéré de l'épave. Après son rétablissement, il enchaîne les rôles dans des séries télévisées australiennes. Puis,  à Hollywood, pour des personnages de terrain, souvent impassibles et durs à cuire.

Mulvey出生于新西兰，拥有毛利人和欧洲血统。他的家人在他八岁时搬到了澳大利亚悉尼。他最出名的是在澳大利亚热门电视剧《Underbelly》中饰演马克·莫兰，以及在《心碎高中》中饰演波格丹“德拉兹”德拉齐奇。Mulvey 与其他 Heartbreak High 演员 Jon Pollard 和 Alle Brunning 一起就读于 Beacon Hill 高中（新南威尔士州）。

2003 年，Mulvey 在一场严重的车祸中以 100 公里/小时的速度迎面相撞时受伤。他被困在车里将近一个小时，直到他从残骸中解救出来。他的脸部中部塌陷，在他的头皮顶部从耳朵到耳朵做了一个切口，他的脸被“拉下来”，然后插入17块钛板来修复他的脸部和下巴的骨折。他的左膝盖和脚踝严重骨折，一只眼睛失明。
data.name: 卡兰·马尔韦

data.biography:
Mulvey 出生於紐西蘭，擁有毛利人和歐洲血統。他的家人在他八歲時搬到了澳大利亞悉尼。他最出名的是在澳大利亞熱門電視劇《Underbelly》中飾演馬克·莫蘭，以及在《心碎高中》中飾演波格丹“德拉茲”德拉齊奇。Mulvey 與其他 Heartbreak High 演員 Jon Pollard 和 Alle Brunning 一起就讀於 Beacon Hill 高中（新南威爾士州）。

2003 年，Mulvey 在一場嚴重的車禍中以 100 公裏/小時的速度迎面相撞時受傷。他被困在車裏將近一個小時，直到他從殘骸中解救出來。他的臉部中部塌陷，在他的頭皮頂部從耳朵到耳朵做了一個切口，他的臉被“拉下來”，然後插入 17 塊鈦板來修復他的臉部和下巴的骨折。他的左膝蓋和腳踝嚴重骨折，一隻眼睛失明。

data.overview: Lấy bối cảnh tại một viện bảo tàng nghệ thuật thuộc tập đoàn Sungjin, một tập đoàn lớn nắm giữ nhiều mối liên hệ của giới chính trị và tài chính Hàn Quốc. Phim khai thác tâm lý, tham vọng của những người phụ nữ nỗ lực vươn lên vị trí cao nhất Hàn Quốc. Yoon Jae Hee là con dâu thứ hai của  gia tộc sở hữu Tập đoàn Sungjin. Cô làm việc tại phòng trưng bày nghệ thuật Space Jin. Trong quá khứ, cô chia tay người bạn trai lâu năm để cưới Jung Joon Hyeok - con trai ngoài giá thú của gia đình tài phiệt đó. Yoon Jae Hee muốn giúp chồng mình trở thành tổng thống. Vì thế nên cô hợp tác với Tổng trưởng công tố kế nhiệm và cô bắt đầu chống lại nhà chồng của mình. Jung Joon Hyuk – chồng của Yoon Jae Hee, phát thanh viên của đài JBC, người đàn ông toả ra “ánh hào quang” nhưng bản thân luôn tự ti vì thân phận “con hoang” của mình. Jung Joon Hyuk luôn giả vờ cười nhạo những kẻ tham vọng nhưng tận sâu bên trong, người này luôn ấp ủ chờ thời cơ có thể để thay đổi về đúng bản chất của mình.

data.biography:
Chloë Stevens Sevigny (/ˈsɛvəni/ SEV-ən-ee; born November 18, 1974) is an American actress. Known for her work in independent films, often appearing in controversial or experimental features, Sevigny has received several accolades, including a Golden Globe Award and a nomination for an Academy Award.

After graduating from high school, Sevigny found work as a model and appeared in music videos for Sonic Youth and The Lemonheads, which helped acquire her "it girl" status. In 1995, she made her film debut in Kids and became a prominent performer in the independent film scene throughout the late 1990s, with roles in such films as 1996's Trees Lounge. Sevigny rose to prominence with her portrayal of Lana Tisdel in the drama film Boys Don't Cry (1999), for which she received a nomination for the Academy Award For Best Supporting Actress.

Throughout the 2000s, Sevigny appeared in supporting parts in numerous independent films, including American Psycho (2000), Demonlover(2002), Party Monster and Dogville (both 2003), and The Brown Bunny (2004). Her participation in the latter caused considerable controversy due to a scene in which she performed graphic, unsimulated fellatio. From 2006 to 2011, Sevigny portrayed Nicolette Grant on the HBO series Big Love, for which she won a Golden Globe Award for Best Supporting Actress in 2010. She also appeared in mainstream films such as David Fincher's Zodiac (2007) and starred in numerous television projects, including the British series Hit & Miss (2012), and had supporting roles in Portlandia (2013), two seasons of American Horror Story; and in the Netflix series Bloodline (2015–2017) and Monsters: The Lyle and Erik Menendez Story (2024). 

Sevigny made her directorial debut in 2016 with the short film Kitty. Her third film as a director, White Echo, competed for the Short Film Palme d'Or at the 2019 Cannes Film Festival. She also has a career in fashion design concurrent with her acting work. Over the years, her alternative fashion sense has earned her a reputation as a style icon.

data.biography:
Chloë Stevens Sevigny (* 18. November 1974 in Springfield, Massachusetts) ist eine US-amerikanische Schauspielerin und ehemaliges Model.

Sevigny wuchs in der Kleinstadt Darien im US-Bundesstaat Connecticut auf. Ihre Mutter Janine ist Grundschullehrerin, ihr Vater H. David Sevigny († 1996) arbeitete in einem Versicherungsunternehmen und später als Innenraummaler. Sie hat einen älteren Bruder namens Paul, der als DJ in New York City arbeitet. Sevignys Vorfahren mütterlicherseits stammen aus Polen, väterlicherseits ist sie franko-kanadischer Abstammung.

Sie besuchte die Darien High School und war ein eher rebellischer Teenager. Sie rauchte, rasierte sich den Kopf, experimentierte mit Drogen und schwänzte die Schule. Sie sei ein deprimierter Teenager gewesen und habe sich in der spießigen Kleinstadt Darien gelangweilt, erklärte Sevigny diese Phase später. Es zog sie daher immer häufiger nach New York City, wo sie mit den Skatern im Washington Square Park rumhing. Mit 18 Jahren verließ Sevigny schließlich ihr Elternhaus und mietete sich ein Apartment im Stadtteil Brooklyn.

Sevigny begann ihre Karriere als Model. 1993 wurde sie an einem Zeitungsstand im East Village von einer Mode-Redakteurin des US-amerikanischen Sassy-Magazins angesprochen, die so begeistert von Sevignys außergewöhnlichem Kleidungsstil war, dass sie sie für das Magazin als Model vor die Kamera holte. Später arbeitete Sevigny auch als Praktikantin in der Moderedaktion der Zeitschrift.

Einige Monate später wurde Sevigny erneut wegen ihres „Looks“ auf der Straße angesprochen, diesmal von einer Fotografin, die sie für das britische Mode- und Musikmagazin i-D ablichtete. 1994 wurde sie für das Label X-Girl der Sonic-Youth-Frontfrau Kim Gordon gebucht und posierte in einer Modestrecke des Paper-Magazine. Es folgten diverse weitere Modelaufträge u. a. für H&M und die 1996er Frühjahrs- und Sommerkollektion von Miu Miu.

Erste Rollen spielte Sevigny in Musikvideos der Bands Sonic Youth und Lemonheads. Ihr Filmdebüt gab sie 1995 in dem Independent-Drama Kids von Larry Clark. Ihr ehemaliger Lebensgefährte Harmony Korine hatte das Drehbuch zum Film geschrieben und sie dem Regisseur empfohlen. Mit Korine arbeitete sie auch 1997 an Gummo.

Ihren bis dahin größten schauspielerischen Erfolg feierte Sevigny an der Seite von Hilary Swank in Boys Don’t Cry aus dem Jahr 1999. Für ihre Rolle als Lana Tisdel wurde sie sowohl für den Oscar als auch für den Golden Globe nominiert.

Aufsehen erregte 2003 der Film The Brown Bunny, in dem Sevigny Oralverkehr an Vincent Gallo vollzog, was in den USA für Proteste sorgte. 2010 erhielt sie für ihre Nebenrolle als fundamentalistische Mormonin und Ehefrau eines Polygamisten in der Fernsehserie Big Love den Golden Globe Award.

Im Mai 2012 bekam Sevigny die Rolle der Abigail Williams in David Esbjornsons Bühnenstück Abigail/1702, welches vom 27. Juni bis 8. Juli 2012 in New York aufgeführt wurde. Im selben Jahr verkörperte sie außerdem in der britischen Fernsehserie Hit & Miss eine transweibliche Auftragskillerin und gehört seit 2012 zum Ensemble der Horrorserie American Horror Story.

Chloë Stevens Sevigny (Springfield, 18 novembre 1974) è un'attrice e modella statunitense.

Ha ottenuto la fama internazionale per il ruolo di Lana Tisdel in Boys Don't Cry (1999), per il quale è stata candidata ai Golden Globe e agli Oscar come miglior attrice non protagonista. Dal 2006 al 2011 ha interpretato Nicki Grant nella serie televisiva Big Love (2006-2011), vincendo, nel 2010, un Golden Globe per la migliore attrice non protagonista in una serie.  Chloë Sevigny nasce a Springfield, nel Massachusetts, il 18 novembre 1974 da David Sevigny, un contabile statunitense di origini franco-canadesi, e da Janine Malinowski, una casalinga statunitense di origini polacche. La famiglia però si trasferisce a Darien nel Connecticut, dove cresce.

La sua prima apparizione avviene nel video musicale del singolo Sugar Kane, singolo estratto dall'album Dirty degli Sonic Youth. Esordisce nel cinema con il controverso film indipendente Kids di Larry Clark (1995), incentrato su un gruppo di adolescenti alle prese con sesso e droga. Ancora per il cinema indipendente lavora anche in Mosche da bar del 1996, e Gummo di Harmony Korine (1997).

La notorietà arriva nel 1999 grazie al ruolo di Lana, una giovane provinciale innamorata di un ragazzo transgender, Brandon Teena, nel film Boys Don't Cry, che le procura una candidatura sia al premio Oscar alla miglior attrice non protagonista che al Golden Globe. Il successo di Boys Don't Cry le permette di lavorare in produzioni più importanti come American Psycho (2000) e Dogville (2003) di Lars von Trier.

Nel 2003 Cloe Sevigny accetta il ruolo di Daisy nel film The Brown Bunny di Vincent Gallo, suscitando clamore per una scena di sesso orale non simulata con il regista e co-protagonista Gallo.

Dal 2006 la Sevigny è coprotagonista della serie televisiva della HBO, Big Love, che ruota intorno alla storia di una famiglia di poligami, e sempre nello stesso anno in Zodiac, di David Fincher. Nel 2010 recita in My Son, My Son, What Have Ye Done di Werner Herzog, mentre nel 2012 e nel 2015 viene scelta da Ryan Murphy per far parte dell cast della serie antologica American Horror Story, nella seconda stagione American Horror Story: Asylum e nella quinta stagione American Horror Story: Hotel.

Chloë Sevigny è stata anche testimonial per importanti marchi come Louis Vuitton, Miu Miu, H&M e MAC Cosmetics. Attualmente sta lavorando ad una propria linea di abbigliamento e la casa di moda francese Chloé ha annunciato che la Sevigny sarà una delle testimonial per il suo nuovo profumo.

Nel 2016 esordisce alla regia con il cortometraggio Kitty, tratto da un racconto di Paul Bowles. L'anno seguente realizza, per la serie Miu Miu Women's Tales, il cortometraggio Carmen, presentato al Festival di Venezia.

Chloë Stevens Sevigny (18 Kasım 1974 doğumlu) Amerikalı sinema oyuncusu, moda tasarımcısı ve eski modeldir. Sevigny, 1990'ların ortalarında, hem modelleme hem de New York'un moda sahnesinde dikkatini çeken New York'un yeni "it kızı" olarak etiketleyen New York'un Sassy dergisindeki çalışmasıyla geniş moda kariyeriyle tanındı.

Sevigny, ilk filmini tartışmalı Larry Clark filmi Kids'te (1995) başrol oynayarak yaptı ve bu performansıyla Independent Spirit Ödülü'ne aday gösterildi. On yıl boyunca genel olarak iyi karşılanan bağımsız ve genellikle avangard filmlerdeki uzun roller dizisi, Sevigny'nin bağımsız film kraliçesi olarak ününü sağladı. Sevigny, En İyi Yardımcı Kadın Oyuncu dalında Akademi Ödülü ve Altın Küre adaylığı aldığı Boys Don't Cry'daki ilk ana rolüyle ciddi eleştirel ve ticari tanınırlık kazanması ancak 1999'a kadar sürdü.

Sevigny, American Psycho (2000), Party Monster (2003), The Brown Bunny (2003) ve Dogville (2003) gibi çoğunlukla bağımsız sanat evi filmlerinde oyunculuk yapmaya devam etti. Sevigny, 2006'da HBO televizyon dizisi Big Love'da başrol oynadı ve 2010'da En İyi Yardımcı Kadın Oyuncu dalında Altın Küre kazandı. Ayrıca Sevigny'nin iki Off-Broadway tiyatro kredisi var ve birkaç müzik videosunda rol aldı. Ayrıca, en son Manhattan'ın Açılış Töreni butiği ile birlikte birkaç gardırop koleksiyonu tasarladı.

Chloe Sevigny, născută sub numele Chloe Stevens Sevigny în data de 18 noiembrie 1974 la Darien, Connecticut, SUA, este fiica lui H. David Sevigny (care a murit de cancer în anul 1996) şi a Janinei Malinowski, poloneză-americană.

La vârsta de 18 ani, Chloe se mută într-un apartament în Brooklyn. În 1993 a fost angajată a revistei "Sassy". Fratele ei mai mare, Paul Sevigny, este un foarte cunoscut DJ la New York. De asemenea, actriţa mai deţine un apartament in East Village, Manhattan. În ultimii ani ai adolescenţei şi în primii ani ai tinereţii, Chloe a avut o relaţie amoroasă cu scenaristul şi regizorul Harmony Korine. Chloe a mai fost si model pentru "H&M". Ciudat este că în ultimul an de liceu, actriţa s-a tuns zero. În liceu era babysitter pentru Topher Grace. Actriţa a dezvăluit că pe banii făcuţi la filmările pentru producţia "Kids" (1995) a făcut o călătorie în Europa. In 2001, actriţa a refuzat un rol în "Legally Blonde" pentru care ar fi primit suma de 500.000 $.

Chloe Sevigny este descendenta aristocratului francez marchizul de Sevigne. Unul din filmele preferate este"Picnic at Hanging Rock" ce datează din anul 1975. Este fana muzicianului Steven Patrick Morrissey şi a fostei trupe de care acesta a aparţinut, şi anume "The Smiths". Chloe a participat la un concert al acestuia în toamna anului 2007 unde actriţa s-a îmbrăcat ca Jeanne D'Arc deoarece această personalitate istorică apare printre versurile solistului.

克洛伊·史蒂文斯·塞维尼（Chloë Stevens Sevigny，1974年11月18日-），美国电影女演员、时装设计师、前模特。Sevigny 在 1990 年代中期以其广泛的时尚生涯而闻名，无论是模特还是她在纽约的 Sassy 杂志的工作，该杂志当时将她称为新的“it girl”，在纽约时尚界引起了她的关注。

塞维尼在备受争议的拉里·克拉克电影《孩子们》（1995 年）中担任主角，首次亮相，她的表演获得了独立精神奖提名。在这十年中，塞维尼在广受好评的独立电影中扮演了一系列角色，这些角色奠定了塞维尼作为独立电影女王的声誉。直到 1999 年，塞维尼才因在《男孩不哭》中的第一个主流角色而获得了严重的评论界和商业认可，并因此获得了奥斯卡奖和金球奖最佳女配角提名。

塞维尼继续出演大部分独立的艺术电影，如《美国精神病人》（2000年）、《派对怪物》（2003年）、《棕色兔子》（2003年）和《狗城》（2003年）。2006 年，塞维尼在 HBO 电视连续剧《大爱》中担任主角，并因此获得了 2010 年金球奖最佳女配角奖。此外，塞维尼还拥有两部非百老汇戏剧作品，并出演了几部音乐录影带。她还设计了多个衣橱系列，最近一次是与曼哈顿的开幕式精品店合作。
data.name: 克洛伊·塞维尼

克洛伊·史蒂文斯·塞維尼（Chloë Stevens Sevigny，1974 年 11 月 18 日-），美國電影女演員、時裝設計師、前模特。Sevigny 在 1990 年代中期以其廣泛的時尚生涯而聞名，無論是模特還是她在紐約的 Sassy 雜誌的工作，該雜誌當時將她稱為新的“it girl”，在紐約時尚界引起了她的關注。

塞維尼在備受爭議的拉里·克拉克電影《孩子們》（1995 年）中擔任主角，首次亮相，她的表演獲得了獨立精神獎提名。在這十年中，塞維尼在廣受好評的獨立電影中扮演了一系列角色，這些角色奠定了塞維尼作為獨立電影女王的聲譽。直到 1999 年，塞維尼才因在《男孩不哭》中的第一個主流角色而獲得了嚴重的評論界和商業認可，並因此獲得了奧斯卡獎和金球獎最佳女配角提名。

塞維尼繼續出演大部分獨立的藝術電影，如《美色殺人狂》（2000 年）、《派對怪物》（2003 年）、《棕色兔子》（2003 年）和《狗城》（2003 年）。2006 年，塞維尼在 HBO 電視聯續劇《大愛》中擔任主角，並因此獲得了 2010 年金球獎最佳女配角獎。此外，塞維尼還擁有兩部非百老匯戲劇作品，並出演了幾部音樂錄影帶。她還設計了多個衣櫥系列，最近一次是與曼哈頓的開幕式精品店合作。
data.name: 克洛伊·塞維尼

Jang Ki-yong (born August 7, 1992) is a South Korean actor and model. He began his career in the modelling industry and debuted as an actor through a guest appearance on It's Okay, That's Love (2014). He gained popularity with Confession Couple (2017) and was cast in Come and Hug Me (2018), his first-ever lead role. Jang rose to prominence with Search: WWW (2019) and My Roommate Is a Gumiho (2021), and is also known for his roles in My Mister (2018), Born Again (2020) and The Atypical Family (2024).

As a model, Jang earned several awards including the "Fashion Model Award" at the 2014 Asia Model Awards and "Best Dressed Model" at the 2015 Korea's Best Dresser Swan Awards. His transition to acting earned him the accolades "Best New Actor (TV)" at the 2019 Baeksang Arts Awards, the "Excellence Award" at the 2018 MBC Drama Awards and more. Jang is also known for his endorsements with brands Estée Lauder, Lancôme, and Nivea Men.
data.name: Jang Ki-yong

data.biography: Anson Adams Mount IV jest jedynym dzieckiem Nancy Smith i Ansona Mounta II - redaktora sportowego "Playboya". Przyszedł na świat 25 lutego 1973 roku w White Bluff w stanie Tennessee. Po ukończeniu Dickson County High School w Dickson (1991) i Uniwersytetu Południa (1995), w latach 1995-1998 uczęszczał na Columbia University dla tytułu magistra sztuki programu aktorskiego (Master of Fine Arts). Mając 26 lat, w roku 1999, zadebiutował na małym ekranie w jednym z odcinków popularnych seriali: "Ally McBeal" i "Seks w wielkim mieście". Rok później pojawił się w roli Dr. Montville w kilku odcinkach nowojorskiego serialu "Brygada Ratunkowa" [2000, 2001] i wystąpił po raz pierwszy w kinie w trzech filmach: "Ryzyko" (Boiler Room) z Vin'em Dieselem, dramacie "Tully" i horrorze "Ulice strachu 2: Ostatnia odsłona" (Urban Legends: Final Cut). Przełomem w karierze aktorskiej okazała się postać Bena w komedii "Crossroads - Dogonić marzenia" (2002) u boku debiutującej w filmie piosenkarki Britney Spears.

Енсон Адамс Маунт IV (народився 25 лютого 1973 року) — американський актор, який знімався як у фільмах, так і в телешоу. Маунт також зіграв Джима Стіла в короткочасному серіалі NBC Conviction і з'явився в незалежному фільмі «Таллі» з Джуліанною Ніколсон у ролі головного героя Таллі Коутса, плейбоя, чиї манери змінюються, коли він зустрічає Еллу Смоллі (Ніколсон), друга його брат.

Маунт родом з невеликого містечка Вайт Блафф, штат Теннессі. Його батько, Енсон Адамс Маунт II, був одним із перших редакторів журналу Playboy, а мати була професійною гольфісткою.

data.biography:
Justin Hartley (born January 29, 1977) is an American actor.

He is known for his television roles that include Fox Crane on the NBC daytime soap opera Passions (2002–2006), Oliver Queen/Green Arrow on The CW television series Smallville (2006–2011), and Adam Newman on the CBS daytime soap opera The Young and the Restless (2014–2016) which earned him an Emmy nomination. Hartley appeared in the recurring role of Patrick Osbourne in the third season of the television series Revenge. Since 2016, he has starred in the NBC drama series This Is Us, for which he was nominated for the Critics' Choice Television Award for Best Supporting Actor in a Drama Series.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia
data.name: Justin Hartley

data.biography:
Justin Scott Hartley (29 de enero de 1977)​ es un actor estadounidense.

Es conocido por sus papeles en televisión que incluyen a Fox Crane en la serie diaria de la NBC Passions (2002–2006), a Oliver Queen en la serie de The CW Smallville (2006–2011), y a Adam Newman en la serie diaria de la CBS The Young and the Restless (2014–2016) que le valió una nominación al Emmy.

Apareció en el papel recurrente de Patrick Osbourne en la tercera temporada de la serie de televisión Revenge. Desde 2016, es parte del reparto principal en la serie de drama This Is Us, que le ha valido una nominación a los Critics Choice Television Awards por Mejor Actor Secundario de una serie dramática.

Justin Scott Hartley, 29 Ocak 1977 tarihinde Knoxville, Illinois, ABD'de dünyaya geldi. Lisans eğitimini Southern Illinois University Carbondale ve University of Illinois at Chicago'da tarih ve tiyatro dallarında tamamladıktan sonra oyunculuk kariyerine odaklanmak için Los Angeles'a taşındı.

Profesyonel kariyerine 2002 yılında, NBC'nin gündüz kuşağı dizisi "Passions"ta Fox Crane karakterini canlandırarak adım attı. Bu rolde 2006 yılına kadar kalarak tanınırlık kazandı. Gündüz kuşağı dizilerinden primetime televizyonuna geçişi, 2006 yılında The CW'nun popüler süper kahraman dizisi "Smallville" kadrosuna katılmasıyla gerçekleşti. Dizide Oliver Queen, namıdiğer Green Arrow karakterini canlandırdı. Başlangıçta yinelenen bir rol olarak başladığı bu karakter, izleyiciler tarafından çok sevilince dizinin ana kadrosuna dahil edildi ve 2011'deki finaline kadar bu önemli rolü sürdürdü.

"Smallville"in ardından Hartley, "Emily Owens, M.D." (2012-2013) dizisinde başrollerden birini üstlendi. 2013-2014 yılları arasında "Revenge" dizisinde Victoria Grayson'ın uzun süredir kayıp olan oğlu Patrick Osbourne karakteriyle ve "Mistresses" (2014-2016) dizisinde Scott Trosman rolüyle dikkat çekti. 2014 yılında "The Young and the Restless" kadrosuna katılarak Adam Newman karakterini devraldı. Bu rol, ona 2016'da Drama Dizilerinde En İyi Erkek Oyuncu dalında Daytime Emmy adaylığı getirdi.

Ancak Hartley'i küresel çapta şöhrete kavuşturan ve kariyerinin zirvesi olan rol, 2016 yılında yayınlanmaya başlayan ve altı sezon süren NBC'nin fenomen dizisi "This Is Us"taki Kevin Pearson karakteri oldu. "Büyük Üçlü"den biri olan Kevin'ın karmaşık ve duygusal yolculuğunu canlandırdığı bu performansıyla eleştirmenlerin beğenisini topladı ve dizinin ansambl kadrosuyla birlikte iki kez Ekran Oyuncuları Birliği (SAG) Ödülü kazandı.

Televizyon kariyerinin yanı sıra "Annelerin Gecesi" (A Bad Moms Christmas) (2017), "Küçük" (Little) (2019), "Av" (The Hunt) (2020) ve başrolünü üstlendiği Netflix yapımı romantik film "Noel Günlüğü" (The Noel Diary) (2022) gibi sinema filmlerinde de rol aldı. "This Is Us"ın 2022'deki finalinin ardından, 2024 yılında CBS'te yayınlanmaya başlayan ve bir ödül avcısını canlandırdığı "Tracker" dizisinin başrolü olan Colter Shaw karakteriyle televizyona döndü.

data.biography:
John Keith Vernon (* 24. Februar 1932 in Zehner, Saskatchewan; † 1. Februar 2005 in Los Angeles, Kalifornien), eigentlich Adolphus Raymondus Vernon Agopsowicz, war ein kanadischer Schauspieler.  Nach kleineren Rollen in der Fernsehserie The Forest Rangers in den frühen 1960er Jahren wurde er durch die CBC-Serie Wojeck, in der er einen Leichenbeschauer mit kriminalistischem Spürsinn spielte, einem größeren Publikum bekannt. Die Serie gilt als Vorläufer der späteren amerikanischen Serie Quincy.

Ende der 1960er Jahre stieg er aus der Serie aus, zog nach Hollywood und übernahm kleinere Rollen in Spielfilmen, jedoch überwogen im Lauf seiner Karriere die Auftritte in Fernsehserien. Später übernahm er Sprechrollen in Zeichentrickserien und Computerspielen. Größere Bekanntheit erlangte er in den USA 1978 mit der Rolle des College-Direktors in der Komödie Ich glaub’, mich tritt ein Pferd.

John Keith Vernon (nascido Adolphus Raymondus Vernon Agopsowicz; 24 de fevereiro de 1932 - 1 de fevereiro de 2005) foi um ator canadense. Ele fez carreira em Hollywood após alcançar o estrelato inicial na televisão no Canadá. Ele era mais conhecido por interpretar Dean Wormer em Clube dos Cafajestes (Animal House), o prefeito em Perseguidor Implacável (Dirty Harry) e Fletcher em Josey Wales: O Fora da Lei (The Outlaw Josey Wales).

data.biography:
John Christopher Reilly (born May 24, 1965) is an American actor. He is known for his character acting, taking on leading and supporting roles in independent drama films and studio comedies. He gained exposure through his supporting roles in Tony Scott's Days of Thunder (1990), Paul Thomas Anderson's films Hard Eight (1996), Boogie Nights (1997) and Magnolia (1999), and Martin Scorsese's Gangs of New York (2002) and The Aviator (2004). Reilly was nominated for the Academy Award for Best Supporting Actor and the corresponding Golden Globe Award for his role in the musical film Chicago (2002). Reilly's other notable films include The River Wild (1994), The Thin Red Line (1998), and The Hours (2002).

Reilly gained prominence for his roles in comedy films such as Cal Naughton in Talladega Nights: The Ballad of Ricky Bobby (2006). He then went on to play the title character in Walk Hard: The Dewey Cox Story (2007) and Dale Doback, one of the two stepbrothers, in Step Brothers (2008). Meanwhile, Reilly began co-starring as Dr. Steve Brule in the comedic television series Tim and Eric Awesome Show, Great Job! (2007–2010), which led to the spin-off series Check It Out! with Dr. Steve Brule (2010–2016). He voiced the title character in the Wreck-It Ralph film series (2012–⁠2018). Reilly is also known for his work in the independent films Cyrus, We Need to Talk About Kevin, and Carnage (all in 2011), The Lobster (2015), and The Sisters Brothers (2018). He combined his comedic and dramatic abilities for his portrayal of comedian Oliver Hardy in the biopic Stan and Ollie (2018), earning nominations for the Golden Globe Award and Critics' Choice Award.

Reilly is also known for his work on television. He created and starred in the Showtime comedy series Moonbase 8 (2020) and led an ensemble cast for the HBO sports drama series Winning Time: The Rise of the Lakers Dynasty (2022–2023). Reilly performs with his band, John Reilly and Friends. For his role in the Broadway revival of Sam Shepard's play True West (2000), he was nominated for the Tony Award for Best Actor in a Play.

data.biography:
John Christopher Reilly (* 24. Mai 1965 in Chicago, Illinois) ist ein US-amerikanischer Schauspieler.

Sein Debüt gab er im Kriegsfilm Die Verdammten des Krieges (1989) von Brian De Palma. Anschließend erlangte er immer größer werdende Bekanntheit durch Nebenrollen in Tage des Donners, Gilbert Grape – Irgendwo in Iowa und Am wilden Fluß. Reilly kollaborierte mehrfach mit Regisseur Paul Thomas Anderson: im Thriller Last Exit Reno und den Dramen Boogie Nights und Magnolia. Für den Regisseur Martin Scorsese spielte er sowohl in Gangs of New York als auch in Aviator. Reilly stand immer wieder für renommierte Filmemacher vor der Kamera, so waren 2003 gleich drei seiner Filme als Bester Film für den Oscar nominiert. Für Chicago, der als Bester Film ausgezeichnet wurde, war Reilly in den Nebendarsteller-Kategorien für den Oscar und den Golden Globe Award nominiert.

Im Jahr 2007 spielte er in der Komödie Walk Hard: Die Dewey Cox Story und wurde dafür für die Grammy Awards und den Golden Globe Award für den Song Walk Hard nominiert. Reilly spielte zusammen mit Will Ferrell in den Komödien Ricky Bobby – König der Rennfahrer und Stiefbrüder. Er sprach die Titelfigur im kommerziell erfolgreichen Animationsfilm Ralph reicht’s und dessen Fortsetzung und spielte im Superhelden-Film Guardians of the Galaxy als auch in Kong: Skull Island. Zwischen 2010 und 2016 spielte Reilly den Titelcharakter in der Fernsehserie Check It Out! with Dr. Steve Brule, der der Serie Tim and Eric Awesome Show, Great Job! entstammt. Unter Regie von Roman Polanski war er 2011 in einer der vier Hauptrollen der satirischen Komödie Der Gott des Gemetzels zu sehen. 2018 verkörperte Reilly den Komiker Oliver Hardy in der Filmbiografie Stan & Ollie, was ihm den Hauptdarsteller-Preis der Boston Society of Film Critics einbrachte.

Quelle: Wikipedia

data.biography:
John C. Reilly, de son nom complet John Christopher Reilly, est un acteur, producteur et scénariste américain né le 24 mai 1965 à Chicago, en Illinois, aux États-Unis.

Il est le cinquième des six enfants de parents catholiques irlandais et s'intéresse au théâtre dès l'âge de 8 ans.

Il obtient son premier rôle au cinéma dans le film Outrages (1989) réalisé par Brian De Palma. D'abord engagé pour un rôle mineur, il impressionne tellement le réalisateur qu'il se voit attribuer un rôle plus important. Il se fait ainsi remarquer et obtient rapidement des rôles dans d'autres films.

Le réalisateur Paul Thomas Anderson lui offrira certains de ses meilleurs rôles: un parieur compulsif dans Double mise (1996), une star du porno dans Boogie Nights (1997), un flic affectueux dans Magnolia (1999). Son rôle d'un soldat envoyé au front dans La Ligne rouge (1998) lui vaut une reconnaissance accrue. Sa carrière théâtrale est également une réussite.

Il tourne également sous la direction des plus grands réalisateurs tels que Martin Scorsese (Gangs of New York, Aviator), Sam Raimi (Pour l'amour du jeu), Wolfgang Petersen (En pleine tempête), Robert Altman (The Last Show), Woody Allen (Ombres et brouillard), Tony Scott (Jours de tonnerre) et Roman Polanski (Carnage).

Mais il n'hésite pas à changer de registre, passant du registre dramatique à la comédie notamment sous la houlette du duo Will Ferrell et Adam McKay en jouant dans Ricky Bobby: Roi du circuit et Frangins malgré eux ou en passant dans le film d'animation en prêtant sa voix dans Numéro 9 et pour Ralph le personnage principal de Les mondes de Ralph.

En 2014, il fait partie du casting du blockbuster de Marvel: Les Gardiens de la Galaxie.

En 1992, il épouse la productrice Alison Dickey, rencontrée sur le tournage d'Outrages, de Brian De Palma, dans lequel il incarnait un rôle secondaire, alors qu'elle était l'assistante de Sean Penn, l'acteur principal.

John C. Reilly est également musicien, jouant avec son propre groupe de folk-country, le "John Reilly & Friends".

Source: Article "John C. Reilly" de Wikipédia en français, soumis à la licence CC-BY-SA 3.0.

John Christopher Reilly (Chicago,  24 de maio de 1965), mais conhecido como John C. Reilly é um ator americano de cinema e teatro. Estreando em Casualties of War em 1989, ele é um dos vários atores cujas carreiras foram lançadas por Brian De Palma. Até o momento, ele apareceu em mais de cinquenta filmes, incluindo três filmes separados em 2002, cada um dos quais foi indicado ao Oscar de Melhor Filme. Ele foi indicado ao Oscar de Melhor Ator Coadjuvante por seu papel em Chicago e um Grammy pela música "Walk Hard", que ele interpretou em Walk Hard: The Dewey Cox Story.

手持一個家常馬克杯，長著一頭亂糟糟的捲髮，尊·基斯杜化·韋利扮演了眾多令人動情的“普通男人”角色。他是他愛爾蘭天主教家庭六個孩子中的第五個，在芝加哥的西南部長大。8 歲便在業餘舞台上表演，他對後隨後在古德曼喜劇學校受訓，並最後成為芝加哥有名的史戴芬沃夫劇團的成員。他因為演出越戰電影《越戰創傷》中的一個小角色，而在電影方面取得突破。90 年代，賴利展現了他令人炫目的才華，演出了許多電影。2002 年，他因為在《芝加哥》裏扮演了蕾妮·齊薇格的傻氣丈夫而. .
data.name: 尊·Ｃ·韋利

data.biography:
Джон С. Райли е актьор, комик, певец и писател който е направил име за себе си в Холивуд с многостранните си актьорски умения, уникалния си глас и странното си чувство за хумор. Той е роден на 24 май 1965 г. в Чикаго, Илинойс, и е израснал в работническо семейство. Райли посещава университета ДеПол, където изучава театър и по-късно става член на известната театрална компания Steppenwolf в Чикаго.

Райли направи актьорския си дебют в филма "Жертви на войната" от 1989 г. и оттогава е участвал в над 75 филма, включително иконични комедии като "Рики Боби: Лудият на макс" и "Доведени братя". Той е получил и критично признание за изпълненията си в по-сериозни драми като "Трябва да говорим за Кевин" и "Чикаго". Райли е номиниран за Оскар, Златен глобус и награда Тони наред с други отличия.

В допълнение към филмовата си кариера Райли е и талантлив музикант и е работил с няколко забележителни артисти, включително Джак Уайт, Бек и Фиона Епъл. Той е издал албуми както като солов изпълнител, така и като част от групата John Reilly & Friends. Райли също е предоставял гласа си за няколко анимационни филма, включително "Разбивачът Ралф" и "LEGO: Филмът".

Въпреки успеха си в Холивуд Райли е останал приземен и достъпен и е известен с неговата приземена личност и ангажираността си към занаята. Той се счита за един от най-многостранните актьори на своето поколение, а изпълненията му му донесоха лоялна база от фенове и уважението на колегите му в индустрията. Със своя талант, хумор и скромност, Джон С. Райли е един от най-обичаните знаменитости в света на развлеченията днес.
data.name: Джон Райли

data.biography: Josep "Pep" Guardiola Sala is a Spanish professional football manager and former player, who is the current manager of Premier League club Manchester City. He is considered one of the greatest managers of all time and holds the records for the most consecutive league games won in La Liga, the Bundesliga and the Premier League.
data.name: Pep Guardiola

data.biography:
Josep "Pep" Guardiola i Sala, 18 Ocak 1971 tarihinde Santpedor, İspanya'da dünyaya gelmiştir. Hem futbolculuk hem de teknik direktörlük kariyerinde elde ettiği başarılar ve futbola getirdiği yeniliklerle spor tarihinin en etkili ve en devrimci figürlerinden biri olarak kabul edilmektedir.

Futbolculuk Kariyeri: Cruyff'un Beyni

Futbola 13 yaşında, efsanevi altyapı La Masia'da başlayan Guardiola, FC Barcelona ile özdeşleşen bir kariyere imza attı. Hollandalı efsane Johan Cruyff'un yarattığı ve "Rüya Takım" olarak adlandırılan efsanevi Barcelona kadrosunun temel direklerinden biri oldu. Defansif orta saha pozisyonunda, oyun kurucu olarak görev yapan Guardiola, sahadaki zekası, pas yeteneği ve oyun görüşüyle takımın beyniydi. Barcelona formasıyla, 1991'den 1994'e kadar üst üste dört La Liga şampiyonluğu ve kulübün tarihindeki ilk Avrupa Kupası (şimdiki Şampiyonlar Ligi) zaferini (1992) yaşadı.

Teknik Direktörlük Kariyeri: Bir Devrimin Yaratıcısı

Futbolu bıraktıktan sonra teknik direktörlüğe yönelen Guardiola, asıl devrimini saha kenarında gerçekleştirdi. 2007'de Barcelona B takımını çalıştırdıktan sadece bir yıl sonra, 2008'de A takımın başına geçti ve futbol dünyasını sonsuza dek değiştirecek bir dönem başlattı.

FC Barcelona (2008-2012): Guardiola, Cruyff'un total futbol anlayışını temel alarak, kısa paslara, topa sahip olmaya ve sürekli pozisyon değiştirmeye dayalı "tiki-taka" felsefesini mükemmelleştirdi. Lionel Messi'yi merkezde oynatarak "sahte 9" rolünü popülerleştirdi ve Xavi ile Iniesta gibi orta saha dehalarıyla tarihin en dominant takımlarından birini yarattı. Barcelona'da geçirdiği dört sezonda, 2 UEFA Şampiyonlar Ligi, 3 La Liga ve 2 Kral Kupası da dahil olmak üzere kazanılması mümkün olan 19 kupanın 14'ünü müzesine götürdü.

Bayern Münih (2013-2016): Barcelona'dan ayrıldıktan sonra bir yıl dinlenen Guardiola, Alman devi Bayern Münih'in başına geçti. Burada da oyun felsefesini uygulayarak ligi domine etti ve üst üste üç Bundesliga şampiyonluğu kazandı.

Manchester City (2016-Günümüz): 2016'da İngiliz kulübü Manchester City'nin başına geçerek kariyerindeki en uzun soluklu ve en başarılı dönemine imza attı. Premier League'i taktiksel olarak yeniden şekillendiren Guardiola, City'ye tarihindeki en parlak günlerini yaşattı. Üst üste kazandığı 6 Premier League şampiyonluğu ile ligde bir hanedanlık kurdu. Bu başarısını, 2022-2023 sezonunda Premier League, FA Cup ve kulübün tarihindeki ilk UEFA Şampiyonlar Ligi kupasını aynı sezonda kazanarak "üçleme" (treble) yaparak taçlandırdı. Bu başarı, onu tarihte iki farklı kulüple üçleme yapan ilk teknik direktör yaptı.

Pep Guardiola, sadece kazandığı sayısız kupayla değil, aynı zamanda oyunun oynanış şeklini değiştiren taktiksel bir deha, bir filozof ve modern futbolun en büyük yenilikçisi olarak kabul edilmektedir. Onun takımları, estetik ve başarıyı bir araya getirerek milyonlarca futbolsevere ilham vermeye devam etmektedir.

data.biography: 侯梦莎，1985年8月16日出生于辽宁省大连市，毕业于南京大学文学院戏剧影视艺术系08级硕士生，中国内地女演员。2008年，参演军旅动作剧《狙击生死线》，从此开始演艺事业。2010年，在惊悚悬疑剧《愤怒的面具》中饰演白静苏。2012年10月，主演的军旅剧《我是特种兵之利刃出鞘》获得“北京电视剧之夜”年度优秀电视剧，因在剧中饰演唐心怡而引起关注；11月，在军旅剧《麻辣女兵》中饰演凌云。2013年，客串出演军旅剧《特种兵之火凤凰》。2014年1月，主演谍战剧《与狼共舞2》；2月，主演革命历史剧《飘帅》；9月，出演谍战剧《刺蝶》。2015年1月，主演的谍战悬疑剧《铁核桃》获得上海新闻综合频道提升贡献奖；4月，主演革命历史剧《使命召唤》。2016年1月，主演军旅剧《陆军一号》；7月，主演公安刑侦剧《警花与警犬》；9月，主演犯罪动作喜剧爱情剧《我的辣妹保镖》。2017年，主演刑侦剧《警花与警犬之再上征程》。

data.biography:
Хардвик родился в Саванне, штат Джорджия, и окончил Университет Джорджии, в который поступил по спортивной стипендии[1]. После неудачи с поступлением в НФЛ, Хардвик брал разного рода работу, чтобы оплачивать обучение актёрской профессии. В 2000-х он начал появляться с небольшими ролями в фильмах «Салон красоты» (2005), «Второй шанс» (2006) и «Чудо святой Анны» (2008), а также снимался на регулярной основе в недолго просуществовавших сериалах TNT «Спасение» (2006) и «Под прикрытием» (2009—2010).

В 2010 году Хардвик сыграл роль мужа-гея героини Джанет Джексон в фильме «Песни о любви», а в следующем году снялся с Салли Ричардсон-Уитфилд в фильме Авы Дюверней «Я буду следовать». Дюверней затем сняла его в своем фильме «На полпути в никуда» (2012), получившем массу похвалы от критиков. Также он появился в фильмах «Пипец» (2010), «Команда-А» (2010) и «Спаркл» (2012). В 2013—2014 годах он играл любовный интерес Габриэль Юнион в сериале BET «Быть Мэри Джейн», за который он дважды номинировался на NAACP Image Award[2].

В 2014 году Хардвик начал исполнять ведущую роль в сериале Starz «Власть в ночном городе»[3]. Роль принесла ему ещё одну номинацию на NAACP Image Award[2]. В 2017 году Хардвик сыграл роль офицера Катчера в фильме «Выстрел в пустоту».
data.name: Омари Хардвик

data.biography: Rafe Joseph Spall ist ein englischer Schauspieler auf der Bühne und auf der Leinwand. Er ist vielleicht am bekanntesten für seine Rollen in BBCs The Shadow Line, Channel 4's Pete versus Life, One Day, Anonymous und dem Ridley Scott Film Prometheus. Er spielte den Schriftsteller Yann Martel im Film Life of Pi von 2012.

Rafe Joseph Spall (n. 10 de marzo de 1983) es un actor británico. Es más conocido por su trabajo en la serie Pete Versus Life, y en las películas One Day, Anonymous, Prometheus, del director Ridley Scott, y Life of Pi. En televisión, se reconoce su trabajo en el episodio White Christmas de la popular serie británica Black Mirror.

Spall nació en el hospital King's College, en Camberwell, Londres, Inglaterra. Es el hijo del actor Timothy Spall y su mujer Shane Spall, el segundo de tres hijos. A diferencia de sus dos hermanas, que son profesoras en un colegio de primaria y una diseñadora de ropa, Spall siguió los pasos de su padre. Recibió su nombre por el protagonista de The Knight of the Burning Pestle, un rol que su padre hizo en Royal Shakespeare Company y que luego haría él mismo, Rafe siempre tuvo la ambición de actuar. No habiendo tenido muy buenas notas en el colegio de Haberdashers' Aske's Hatcham, se fue y comenzó en el National Youth Theatre pero tras suspender las pruebas para entrar en esos colegios de arte dramático, empezó su carrera desde abajo.

Mélanie Laurent (French pronunciation: [melani loʁɑ̃]; born 21 February 1983) is a French actress and filmmaker. She is an accomplished actress in the French film industry and the recipient of two César Awards and a Lumières Award. Internationally, Laurent is best known for her roles in Inglourious Basterds (2009), Now You See Me (2013), Operation Finale (2018) and 6 Underground (2019). 

Laurent began acting at age sixteen, cast by Gérard Depardieu in a small role in the romantic drama The Bridge (1999). She gained wider recognition for supporting work in several French films, including the comedy Dikkenek (2006), for which she won Étoiles d'Or for Best Female Newcomer. Her breakthrough role came in the 2006 drama film Don't Worry, I'm Fine, for which she won the César Award for Most Promising Actress and the Prix Romy Schneider. Laurent made her Hollywood debut in 2009 with the role of Shosanna Dreyfus in Quentin Tarantino's blockbuster war film Inglourious Basterds. Her performance won the Online Film Critics Society and the Austin Film Critics Association Best Actress Awards.

While she has worked mainly in independent films, including Paris (2008) and Enemy (2013), Laurent also appeared in commercially successful international films, including the comedy-drama Beginners (2011) and the caper film Now You See Me (2013), the former earning her a nomination at the San Diego Film Critics Society Award for Best Supporting Actress. Her other notable works include the art-house drama The Round Up (2010), the comedy-drama The Day I Saw Your Heart (2011), and the mystery thriller Night Train to Lisbon (2013). She is also known for voicing Mary Katherine and Disgust in the French dubs of Epic (2013) and Inside Out (2015). Additionally, she starred in Chris Weitz's 2018 drama Operation Finale, telling the story of the capture of Nazi Adolf Eichmann.

In addition to her film career, Laurent has appeared in stage productions in France. She made her theatre debut in 2010 in Nicolas Bedos's Promenade de santé. The short film De moins en moins (2008) marked her debut as a filmmaker. Her feature film directorial debut is The Adopted (2011). Respire (2014), her second production as a director, was screened in the Critics' Week section at the 2014 Cannes Film Festival. She made her singing debut with a studio album, En attendant (Waiting For You), in 2011.

Mélanie Laurent (* 21. Februar 1983 in Paris, Frankreich) ist eine französische Schauspielerin, Regisseurin und Sängerin, die für ihre vielseitigen Rollen und künstlerischen Projekte bekannt ist. Sie begann ihre Karriere in jungen Jahren und wurde durch ihre Darstellung der Shosanna Dreyfus in Inglourious Basterds (2009) einem internationalen Publikum bekannt.

Laurent spielte in zahlreichen französischen und internationalen Produktionen, darunter Keine Sorge, mir geht’s gut (2006), Beginners (2010), Now You See Me – Die Unfassbaren (2013) und Oxygen (2021). Neben ihrer Arbeit als Schauspielerin etablierte sie sich als Regisseurin und inszenierte Filme wie Demain (2015), eine Dokumentation über nachhaltige Lösungen für globale Herausforderungen.

Ihr musikalisches Talent zeigte sie mit ihrem Album En t’attendant (2011), das sie gemeinsam mit Damien Rice produzierte. Laurent ist bekannt für ihre künstlerische Vielseitigkeit und ihr Engagement für Umwelt- und soziale Themen. Sie bleibt eine der prägendsten Persönlichkeiten des französischen Kinos und setzt ihre kreative Arbeit in verschiedenen Bereichen fort.

Mélanie Laurent 1983. február 21-én született Párizsban. Édesanyja, Annick balerina, édesapja, Pierre pedig szinkronszínész (többek közt õ szinkronizálja Ned Flanders-t a Simpson család francia verziójában). Zsidó vallású családban nevelkedett, egyik nagyapja még a nácik meghurcolását is túlélte. 

Mélanie művészközegben nőtt fel, a színészettel azonban csak 16 éves korában kezdett el foglalkozni. 1998-ban egy barátjával meglátogatta az Asterix és Obelix forgatását, ahol megismerkedett Gérard Depardieu-vel, aki felfigyelt rá és szerepet ajánlott neki a The Bridge nevű drámában. Ez volt Mélanie első filmszerepe.

1999 és 2009 között húsz filmben tűnt fel. 2006-ban szerepelt a Köszönöm, jól vagyok című filmben, amiért César-díjat nyert.

2008-ban a saját forgatókönyvéből megrendezte a De moins en moins címû filmjét, ami a Legjobb kisfilm kategóriában jelölve lett a 61. Cannes-i Filmfesztiválon.

2009-ben a párizsi Théâtre Marigny-ben megrendezhette első színdarabját, a Mi-cuit cœur pistache-t. Ám ezzel a munkájával fel kellett hagynia, amikor is Quentin Tarantino õt választotta Shosanna Dreyfus szerepére akkor készülő mozijában, a Becstelen Brigantykban. A film meghozta Mélanie számára a nemzetközi sikert.

2010-ben feltűnt a Kezdők (Beginners) és a Razzia (La rafle) című filmekben. A 2011-es évben ő vezette a Cannes-i Filmfesztivál nyitó és záróünnepségét, valamint megrendezte első nagyjátékfilmjét, amely a "Les adoptés" címet viseli. 2013-ban a Szemfényvesztők (Now You See Me) című krimi/thrillerben volt látható, amelyben Mark Ruffalo, Jesse Eisenberg és Morgan Freeman oldalán játszott.

2014-ben újra a rendezői székbe ült, ezúttal a Respire című francia drámát készítette el. Szintén ebben az évben láthattuk az Aloft című filmben Cillian Murphy és Jennifer Connelly oldalán. 2015-ben főszerepet játszott a Boomerang című romantikus drámában, majd mellékszerepben tűnt fel az Angelina Jolie és Brad Pitt főszereplésével készült A tengernél című filmben.

Mélanie Laurent est une actrice, réalisatrice et chanteuse française.

En 2007, elle reçoit le César du meilleur espoir féminin pour Je vais bien, ne t'en fais pas. Son engagement pour la défense de l'environnement se concrétise dans la co-réalisation, avec Cyril Dion, du film Demain, qui remporte le César du meilleur film documentaire 2016 et vaut aux deux réalisateurs d'être nommés docteurs honoris causa de l'université de Namur la même année.
data.name: Mélanie Laurent

data.biography: Mélanie Anné Laurent (Paris, 21 de fevereiro de 1983) é cantora, atriz e diretora francesa, nasceu em Paris, França. Ela é filha de Annick, professora de balé, e Pierre, comediante de voz, mais conhecido pela versão francesa de Os Simpsons. Em 1998, Laurent visitou o platô de Asterix e Obelix contra César com um amigo quando atraiu a atenção de Gerard Depardieu. Ele ofereceu-lhe um papel em seu próximo filme - Uma ponte entre duas margens. Após sua primeira apresentação, sua carreira cresceu e, em 2009, ela estreou em Hollywood nos Bastardos Inglórios de Quentin Tarantino.

Mélanie Laurent przyszła na świat w Paryżu, 21 lutego 1983 roku. Pochodzi z artystycznej rodziny - jej ojciec jest aktorem, a matka nauczycielką baletu. Mimo tego Mélanie nie zawsze była zainteresowana pracą w show-biznesie. W 1998, kiedy wraz z przyjaciółkami odwiedziła plan filmu "Asterix i Obelix kontra Cezar", została zauważona przez aktora Gerarda Depardieu, który postanowił obsadzić ją w swoim najnowszym filmie "Most pomiędzy dwoma brzegami". Choć rola Mélanie nie była duża, zainteresowała się ona światem filmu i pracą jako aktorka. Pozwoliło jej to wystąpić na drugim planie w wielu francuskich filmach. W 2006 roku Mélanie zagrała główną postać Lili w dramacie "Je Vais Bien, Ne T'en Fais Pas", gdzie pokazała swoje umiejętności aktorskie. Krytyka i publiczność ciepło przyjęła film, a przede wszystkim Mélanie, która w 2007 roku została za ten występ wyróżniona Cezarem jako najbardziej obiecująca aktorka. Mélanie jest znana polskiej publiczności z drugoplanowej roli Laetitiy w obrazie Cédrica Klapischa "Niebo nad Paryżem". Zaczęła cieszyć się zainteresowaniem nie tylko francuskich twórców. W 2009 roku wystąpiła u Quentina Tarantino w "Inglourious Basterds".

Mélanie Laurent (nacida el 21 de febrero de 1983) es una actriz, cantante, pianista, guionista y directora francesa, más conocida por el público internacional por su papel en "Malditos bastardos" (2009). Laurent nació en París, hija de Annick, una bailarina, y Pierre Laurent, un actor de doblaje. Es judía y tiene ascendencia tanto asquenazí como sefardí tunecina. Su abuelo sobrevivió a la deportación de los nazis. Tuvo una larga relación con el también actor francés Julien Boisselier. Ella describe al artista Damien Rice y Tarantino como sus dos "maestros".

梅拉尼·罗兰，法国当红女新星。1983年生在法国巴黎，梅拉尼·罗兰的母亲是位芭蕾老师，父亲是为演员。虽然生长在一个充满艺术气息的环境里，但她直到1998年才正式开始演艺生涯。那年她跟朋友一起参观《美丽新世界》剧组（朋友的爸爸是剧组一员），给著名演员杰拉尔·德帕迪约留下了深刻的印象，推荐她在其下一部电影《偷情桥》中扮演一个角色，这个角色不大，但使得梅拉尼对表演产生了浓厚兴趣。次年她出演了电视电影《夜路》，再就与路易斯·加瑞尔合作了《这是我的身体》，该片在戛纳电影上受到好评，并收获十项恺撒奖提名。同一年，梅拉尼通过了法国中学毕业考试，继续追求其在电影事业上的发展。

　　接着，她在几部取得了巨大票房成绩的电影中扮演配角，包括广受观众喜爱的《我心遗忘的节奏》。导演菲利普·里奥雷看了该片后留下深刻印象，决定让她扮演《我会好起来》中的女主角Elise 'Lili' Tellier。由于片中的出色表演，06年她在Prix Romy Schneider获了奖，并在07年凯撒奖上获得“最具前途女演员”奖。

　　梅拉尼·罗兰曾主持第64届戛纳电影节开幕式和闭幕式。她还被法国设计师Maxime Simoëns视为缪斯女神。

梅拉尼·羅蘭，法國當紅女新星。1983 年生在法國巴黎，梅拉尼·羅蘭的母親是位芭蕾老師，父親是為演員。雖然生長在一個充滿藝術氣息的環境裏，但她直到 1998 年才正式開始演藝生涯。那年她跟朋友一起參觀《美麗新世界》劇組（朋友的爸爸是劇組一員），給著名演員傑拉爾·德帕迪約留下了深刻的印象，推薦她在其下一部電影《偷情橋》中扮演一個角色，這個角色不大，但使得梅拉尼對錶演產生了濃厚興趣。次年她出演了電視電影《毒心術》，再就與路易斯·加瑞爾合作了《這是我的身體》，該片在戛納電影上受到好評，並收穫十項愷撒獎提名。同一年，梅拉尼透過 透過 透過 通過了法國中學畢業考試，繼續追求其在電影事業上的發展。

接著，她在幾部取得了巨大票房成績的電影中扮演配角，包括廣受觀眾喜愛的《我心遺忘的節奏》。導演菲利普·里奧雷看了該片後留下深刻印象，決定讓她扮演《我會好起來》中的女主角 Elise 'Lili' Tellier。由於片中的出色表演，06 年她在 Prix Romy Schneider 獲了獎，並在 07 年凱撒獎上獲得“最具前途女演員”獎。

梅拉尼·羅蘭曾主持第 64 屆戛納電影節開幕式和閉幕式。她還被法國設計師 Maxime Simoëns 視為繆斯女神。

data.biography:
Mélanie Laurent (pronuncia francese: [melani loʁɑ̃]; nata il 21 febbraio 1983) è un'attrice e regista francese. È un'attrice affermata nell'industria cinematografica francese e ha ricevuto due Premi César e un Premio Lumières. A livello internazionale, Laurent è conosciuta soprattutto per i suoi ruoli in Bastardi Inglourious Basterds (2009), Now You See Me (2013), Operation Finale (2018) e 6 Underground (2019).

Laurent ha iniziato a recitare a sedici anni, scelto da Gérard Depardieu per un piccolo ruolo nel dramma romantico Il ponte (1999). Ha ottenuto un riconoscimento più ampio per i suoi lavori di supporto in diversi film francesi, tra cui la commedia Dikkenek (2006), per la quale ha vinto l'Étoiles d'Or come Miglior Debuttante Femminile. Il suo ruolo di svolta è arrivato nel film drammatico del 2006 Don't Worry, I'm Fine, per il quale ha vinto il César come Attrice Più Promettente e il Prix Romy Schneider. Laurent ha debuttato a Hollywood nel 2009 con il ruolo di Shosanna Dreyfus nel film bellico di successo di Quentin Tarantino, Bastardi Inglourious. La sua interpretazione ha vinto i premi Online Film Critics Society e l'Austin Film Critics Association come Miglior Attrice.

Pur avendo lavorato principalmente in film indipendenti, tra cui Paris (2008) e Enemy (2013), Laurent è apparsa anche in film internazionali di successo commerciale, tra cui la commedia drammatica Beginners (2011) e il film di colpi Now You See Me (2013), il primo che le ha valso una nomination al San Diego Film Critics Society Award come Miglior Attrice Non Protagonista. Altre sue opere di rilievo includono il dramma d'autore The Round Up (2010), la commedia-drammatica The Day I Saw Your Heart (2011) e il thriller misterioso Night Train to Lisbon (2013). È anche nota per aver doppiato Mary Katherine e Disgust nei doppiaggi francesi di Epic (2013) e Inside Out (2015). Inoltre, ha recitato nel dramma Operation Finale di Chris Weitz del 2018, che racconta la cattura del nazista Adolf Eichmann.

Oltre alla carriera cinematografica, Laurent è apparsa in produzioni teatrali in Francia. Ha debuttato a teatro nel 2010 nella Promenade de santé di Nicolas Bedos. Il cortometraggio De moins en moins (2008) ha segnato il suo debutto come regista. Il suo debutto alla regia di un lungometraggio è The Adopted (2011). Respire (2014), la sua seconda produzione come regista, è stata proiettata nella sezione Critics' Week al Festival di Cannes 2014. Ha debuttato come cantante con un album in studio, En attendant (Aspettando Voi), nel 2011.

Krzysztof Czeczot (ur. 25 lipca 1979 w Bytowie) – polski aktor, dramaturg, producent i reżyser teatralny, telewizyjny oraz radiowy.

W 2002 ukończył studia na Wydziale Aktorskim PWSFTviT w Łodzi, wykładowca PWSFTviT w Łodzi (doktorat) oraz Akademii Teatralnej w Warszawie. W latach 2002–2009 występował na deskach Teatru Współczesnego w Szczecinie, następnie w Teatrze Rozmaitości w Warszawie. W 2004 został nagrodzony na V Ogólnopolskim Festiwalu Teatrów Niezależnych w Ostrowie Wielkopolskim, zdobywając Grand Prix. W tym samym roku dostał także nagrodę Offeusz na festiwalu Malta w Poznaniu. W grudniu 2014 zadebiutował jako reżyser w Teatrze Telewizji, inscenizując Miss Hiv Macieja Kowalewskiego. Następnie dla TVP2 wyreżyserował „Światło w nocy” Macieja Karpińskiego.

Jest autorem kilku dramatów, libretta operetki Piękna Helena Jacques’a Offenbacha oraz słuchowisk radiowych i audiobooków. Wyreżyserowany przez Czeczota audiobook "Gra o Tron" otrzymał nagrodę miesięcznika Film – Złota Kaczka 2012.  Aktor wystąpił w kilkudziesięciu filmach i serialach telewizyjnych. (Wikipedia)
data.name: Krzysztof Czeczot

data.biography: Krzysztof Czeczot is a Polish actor, director and producer; he holds a doctorate from the Acting Department at the Łódź Film School, where he now teaches. Since 2013 he has been the head of Osorno, a sound production company that works on audio-visual productions, advertisements and audiobooks. Czeczot has written several works for the theatre and a libretto for Jacques Offenbach’s operetta La belle Hélène (Opera Krakowska, Opera na Zamku – Szczecin). He has written and directed radio plays that won awards at the Two Theatres festival in Sopot. Czeczot’s innovative audio work Andy won the Best European Radio Drama of the Year award in Berlin, the first prize at this level in the history of Polish radio. He is now working on Europe’s largest radio project: the superproduction Biblia Audio, which will include five hundred actors.
data.name: Krzysztof Czeczot

data.biography: Richard Colin Brake (born 30 November 1964) is a Welsh actor. Following his film debut in Death Machine (1994), Brake had a supporting role as Joe Chill in Batman Begins (2005). He subsequently appeared in numerous horror films such as Doom (2005), Hannibal Rising (2007), Mandy (2018), and Barbarian (2022), as well as his first lead role in Perfect Skin (2018). A frequent collaborator of Rob Zombie, Brake has appeared in four of his films: Halloween II (2009), 31 (2016), 3 from Hell (2019), and The Munsters (2022).

data.biography:
Richard Brake, 30 Kasım 1964 tarihinde Ystrad Mynach, Galler'de dünyaya gelmiştir. Ailesiyle birlikte çok genç yaşta Amerika Birleşik Devletleri'ne göç eden Brake, Kuzey Carolina, Tennessee ve Ohio gibi farklı eyaletlerde büyüdü. Oyunculuk eğitimini efsanevi Actors Studio'da tamamlayan Brake, hem Amerikan hem de İngiliz aksanına hakimiyeti ve kendine has, keskin yüz hatlarıyla kısa sürede karakter oyunculuğunun aranan isimlerinden biri haline geldi. Kariyerine 1990'ların başında çeşitli televizyon dizileri ve filmlerdeki yan rollerle başladı.

Brake'in sinema dünyasında geniş kitlelerce tanınmasını sağlayan ilk büyük rolü, Christopher Nolan'ın yönettiği "Batman Başlıyor" (Batman Begins) (2005) filminde geldi. Filmde, Bruce Wayne'in ailesini öldürerek Batman'in doğuşuna istemeden sebep olan suçlu Joe Chill karakterini canlandırdı. Kısa ekran süresine rağmen hikayenin temeli olan bu rol, onun kariyerinde önemli bir yer tuttu. Ardından "Hannibal Doğuyor" (Hannibal Rising) (2007) filminde Enramas Dortlich karakteriyle kötü adam rollerindeki başarısını perçinledi.

Korku sineması hayranları için Richard Brake'i bir kült ikon haline getiren süreç, yönetmen Rob Zombie ile kurduğu yaratıcı ortaklıkla başladı. "Hallowen II" (2009) filminde Gary Scott rolüyle başlayan bu iş birliği, "31" (2016) filmiyle zirveye ulaştı. Bu filmde canlandırdığı sadist kiralık katil Doom-Head karakteri ve özellikle filmin açılışındaki monolog performansı, modern korku sinemasının en ürkütücü performanslarından biri olarak kabul edildi. Zombie ile çalışmaya "3 from Hell" (2019) ve "The Munsters" (2022) filmleriyle devam etti.

Televizyon dünyasında ise dünya çapında fenomen olan "Game of Thrones" dizisinde, serinin en büyük kötüsü olan Night King (Gece Kralı) karakterini canlandıran ilk aktör olarak tarihe geçti. 4. ve 5. sezonlarda, yoğun makyaj ve protezlerin altında, hiç konuşmadan sadece buz gibi bakışlarıyla karakterin korkutucu temelini o attı. Daha sonra yerini başka bir aktöre bıraksa da karakterin ikonikleşen duruşunu yaratan isim Brake oldu.

Yakın dönemde, "The Mandalorian" dizisinin ikinci sezonunda imparatorluk subayı Valin Hess rolüyle "Star Wars" evrenine adım attı ve gerilim dolu performansıyla büyük beğeni topladı. Ayrıca 2022'nin sürpriz hit korku filmi "Barbarian"da da kilit bir rolde yer aldı. "Thor: Karanlık Dünya" (Thor: The Dark World) (2013) ve "Kingsman: Gizli Servis" (Kingsman: The Secret Service) (2014) gibi büyük bütçeli yapımlarda da boy gösteren Richard Brake, genellikle psikopat, tekinsiz veya otoriter kötü adam rolleriyle sinema ve televizyon dünyasındaki özgün yerini korumaktadır.

Richard Madden (born 18 June 1986) is a Scottish actor. He was cast in his first role at age 11 and made his screen acting debut in 2000. He later began performing on stage whilst a student at the Royal Conservatoire of Scotland. In 2007, he toured with Shakespeare's Globe company as Romeo in Romeo and Juliet, a role he reprised in the West End in 2016. Madden rose to fame by portraying Robb Stark in the fantasy drama series Game of Thrones from 2011 to 2013.

Madden subsequently played Prince Kit in the romantic fantasy film Cinderella (2015) and Italian banker Cosimo de' Medici in the first season of the historical fiction series Medici (2016). In 2018, he gained acclaim for his performance as a police officer in the thriller series Bodyguard, for which he won a Golden Globe Award. The following year, Madden was named one of the 100 most influential people in the world by Time. He had supporting roles as music manager John Reid in the biopic Rocketman and Lieutenant Blake in the war film 1917. He has since starred as Ikaris in the Marvel Cinematic Universe superhero film Eternals (2021) and as a spy in the action thriller  Citadel (2023–present).

data.biography:
Richard Madden (* 18. Juni 1986 in Elderslie) ist ein schottischer Schauspieler. Internationale Bekanntheit erlangte er durch seine Rolle des Robb Stark in der Fantasy-Serie Game of Thrones.

Er wurde in einer Hauptrolle als Sebastian in der Fernsehserie Barmy Aunt Boomerang besetzt, die in 6 Folgen von 1999 bis 2000 ausgestrahlt wurde. 2009 erhielt er die Hauptrolle als Dean McKenzie in der BBC-Serie Hope Springs. 2010 spielte er Ripley im Film Chatroom. 2011 war er unter anderem in der sechsteiligen Channel-4-Serie Sirens als Ashley Greenwick zu sehen.

Von 2011 bis 2013 hatte er drei Staffeln lang die Hauptrolle des Robb Stark in der HBO-Serie Game of Thrones inne, der Verfilmung der Fantasysaga Das Lied von Eis und Feuer von George R. R. Martin. Mit der restlichen Besetzung der Serie wurde er jeweils 2012 und 2014 für den Screen Actors Guild Award in der Kategorie Bestes Schauspielensemble in einer Fernsehserie – Drama nominiert. 2012 spielte er außerdem in der zweiteiligen Miniserie Birdsong nach einem Weltkriegsroman von Sebastian Faulks. Zudem spielt er seit 2015 die Hauptrolle des Cosimo de' Medici in der Fernsehserie Die Medici: Herrscher von Florenz.

2018 war er in der auf Netflix veröffentlichten Dramaserie Bodyguard in der Hauptrolle des Agenten David Budd zu sehen. Für seine Darstellung brachte einen Golden Globe Award in der Kategorie Bester Serien-Hauptdarsteller – Drama ein.  Quelle: Wikipedia

data.biography:
Richard Madden, 18 Haziran 1986 tarihinde Elderslie, Renfrewshire, İskoçya'da dünyaya gelmiştir. Bir itfaiyeci baba ve okul asistanı bir annenin oğlu olan Madden, çocukluk yıllarında aşırı utangaçlığını yenmek amacıyla 11 yaşında PACE Gençlik Tiyatrosu'na katıldı. Bu adım, onun oyunculuk yeteneğini keşfetmesini sağladı ve henüz gençken "Complicity" (2000) filmi ve çocuk dizisi "Barmy Aunt Boomerang" (1999-2000) ile kamera karşısına geçti. 2007 yılında İskoçya Kraliyet Konservatuvarı'ndan mezun olarak profesyonel tiyatro kariyerine ağırlık verdi ve Globe Tiyatrosu'nda sahne deneyimi kazandı.

Kariyerindeki asıl büyük patlama ve küresel tanınırlığı, 2011 yılında HBO'nun fenomen dizisi "Game of Thrones" (Taht Oyunları) ile gerçekleşti. Dizide canlandırdığı Eddard Stark'ın en büyük oğlu Robb Stark (Kuzeydeki Kral) karakteri, ona büyük bir hayran kitlesi kazandırdı. Dizinin en şok edici anlarından biri olan "Kızıl Düğün" (Red Wedding) bölümüne kadar sergilediği asil duruş ve liderlik performansı, onu Hollywood'un radarındaki en önemli isimlerden biri yaptı. Bu başarının ardından, Disney'in canlı aksiyon uyarlaması "Cinderella" (2015) filminde Prens Kit rolünü üstlenerek romantik başrol oyuncusu olabileceğini kanıtladı. Aynı dönemde "Lady Chatterley's Lover" ve tarihi dizi "Medici: Masters of Florence" (2016) gibi yapımlarda Cosimo de' Medici'yi canlandırarak dönem projelerindeki başarısını sürdürdü.

Richard Madden için ikinci büyük kariyer zirvesi, 2018 yapımı BBC gerilim dizisi "Bodyguard" oldu. Travma sonrası stres bozukluğu yaşayan polis memuru David Budd'ı canlandırdığı bu dizi, İngiltere'de son on yılın en yüksek izlenme oranlarına ulaştı. Madden, buradaki yoğun ve psikolojik derinliği olan performansıyla Drama Dalında En İyi Erkek Oyuncu Altın Küre (Golden Globe) ödülünü kazandı. Sinemada ise Elton John'un hayatını anlatan müzikal biyografi "Rocketman" (2019) filminde, John'un menajeri ve sevgilisi John Reid rolündeki performansıyla eleştirmenlerden tam not aldı. Sam Mendes'in "1917" (2019) filminde de kısa ama kilit bir rol üstlendi.

Son yıllarda kariyerini büyük bütçeli aksiyon ve bilimkurgu türlerine yönelten İskoç aktör, Chloé Zhao'nun yönettiği Marvel Sinematik Evreni filmi "Eternals" (2021) ile süper kahraman Ikaris olarak izleyici karşısına çıktı. Ardından Amazon Prime'ın şimdiye kadar yapılmış en yüksek bütçeli dizilerinden biri olan casusluk serisi "Citadel" (2023) projesinde Priyanka Chopra Jonas ile başrolü paylaştı. Hem tiyatro kökenli disiplini hem de aksiyon yıldızı karizmasıyla modern sinemanın çok yönlü aktörleri arasında yer almaktadır.

理查德·麦登（Richard Madden，1986年6月18日-），苏格兰演员。他在11岁时出演了他的第一个角色，并于2000年首次亮相银幕。后来，他在苏格兰皇家音乐学院读书时开始在舞台上表演。2007年，他与莎士比亚环球剧团一起巡回演出，在《罗密欧与朱丽叶》中饰演罗密欧，并于2016年在伦敦西区重新扮演了这个角色。麦登因在2011年至2013年的奇幻剧集《权力的游戏》中饰演罗柏·史塔克而声名鹊起。

麦登随后在浪漫奇幻电影《灰姑娘》（2015）中饰演基特王子，并在历史小说系列《美第奇》（2016）的第一季中饰演意大利银行家科西莫·德·美第奇。2018年，他因在惊悚剧集《保镖》中饰演警察而广受赞誉，并因此获得了金球奖。次年，麦登被《时代》杂志评为全球100位最具影响力的人物之一，他在传记片《火箭人》中担任音乐经理约翰·里德，在战争电影《1917》中担任士兵。此后，他在漫威电影宇宙超级英雄电影《永恒族》（2021）中饰演伊卡里斯，并在动作惊悚系列《城堡》（2023）中饰演间谍。
data.name: 理查德·麦登

data.biography: Richard Madden est un acteur écossais né le 18 juin 1986 à Elderslie, Renfrewshire.  Très jeune, il s’investit dans le théâtre d’enfants, puis se forme au Royal Conservatoire of Scotland dont il est diplômé en 2007. Sa percée survient lorsqu’il incarne Robb Stark dans la série Game of Thrones (2011-2013), rôle qui le fait connaître internationalement.  Il joue ensuite le Prince Kit dans Cinderella (2015), Cosimo de’ Medici dans Medici: Masters of Florence (2016) et rencontre une reconnaissance critique majeure avec Bodyguard (2018), pour lequel il reçoit le Golden Globe du meilleur acteur dans une série dramatique.  Au cinéma, il apparaît dans Rocketman (2019), 1917 (2019), le MCU dans Eternals (2021) et plus récemment dans Killer Heat (2024). Richard Madden se distingue par sa capacité à porter des rôles à la fois charismatiques et vulnérables, dans des œuvres variées allant du drame historique à l’action, en passant par les thrillers et les grands récits.

Richard Madden (ur. 18 czerwca 1986) jest szkockim aktorem. Został obsadzony w swojej pierwszej roli w wieku 11 lat, a na ekranie zadebiutował w 2000 roku. Później zaczął występować na scenie, będąc studentem Royal Conservatoire of Scotland. W 2007 roku odbył trasę koncertową z Shakespeare's Globe jako Romeo w Romeo i Julii, rolę tę powtórzył na West Endzie w 2016 roku. Madden zyskał sławę, grając Robba Starka w serialu fantasy Gra o tron ​​od 2011 do 2013 roku.

Następnie Madden zagrał księcia Kita w romantycznym filmie fantasy Kopciuszek (2015) i włoskiego bankiera Cosimo de' Medici w pierwszym sezonie serialu historycznego Medici (2016). W 2018 roku zyskał uznanie za rolę policjanta w thrillerze Bodyguard, za którą otrzymał nagrodę Złotego Globu. W kolejnym roku, Madden został nazwany przez Time jedną ze 100 najbardziej wpływowych osób na świecie. Miał drugoplanowe role jako kierownik muzyczny John Reid w filmie biograficznym Rocketman i porucznik Blake w filmie wojennym 1917. Od tego czasu zagrał rolę Ikarisa w filmie superbohaterskim Marvel Cinematic Universe Eternals (2021) i jako szpieg w thrillerze akcji Cytadela (2023–obecnie).

Opis powyżej pochodzi z artykułu Wikipedii Richard Madden, licencjonowanego na podstawie CC-BY-SA, pełna lista współpracowników na Wikipedii.

理察·麥登（Richard Madden，1986 年 6 月 18 日-），蘇格蘭演員。他在 11 歲時出演了他的第一個角色，並於 2000 年首次亮相銀幕。後來，他在蘇格蘭皇家音樂學院讀書時開始在舞台上表演。2007 年，他與莎士比亞環球劇團一起巡迴演出，在《羅密歐與茱麗葉之後現代激情篇》中飾演羅密歐，並於 2016 年在倫敦西區重新扮演了這個角色。麥登因在 2011 年至 2013 年的奇幻劇集《權力的遊戲》中飾演羅柏·史塔克而聲名鵲起。

麥登隨後在浪漫奇幻電影《灰姑娘》（2015 年）中飾演基特王子，並在歷史小説系列《美第奇》（2016 年）的第一季中飾演義大利銀行家科西莫·德·美第奇。2018 年，他因在驚悚劇集《護花傾情》中飾演警察而廣受讚譽，並因此獲得了金球獎。次年，麥登被《時代》雜誌評為全球 100 位最具影響力的人物之一，他在傳記片《搖滾太空人》中擔任音樂經理約翰·里德，在戰爭電影《1917》中擔任士兵。此後，他在漫威電影宇宙超級英雄電影《永恆族》（2021 年）中飾演伊卡里斯，並在動作驚悚系列《城堡》（2023 年）中飾演間諜。
data.name: 理察·麥登

data.biography: Сергей Маликович Епишев - российский актёр театра и кино. Музыкант, вокалист шоу-группы «Трепанга». В 1997 году окончил II студию Школы драматического искусства театра «Ильхом». В 2001 году окончил Театральное училище имени Щукина (учился у Ю.В. Шлыкова) и был принят в труппу Театра Вахтангова. Также участвовал в постановках Театра.doc, Театра наций, Центра драматургии и режиссуры. В течение многих лет был соавтором и соведущим церемонии награждения театральной премией «Гвоздь сезона» (вместе с Константином Богомоловым), которая традиционно проходит в форме театрального капустника.
data.name: Сергей Епишев

The agency has expanded to offices in Los Angeles, Miami, and Las Vegas. data.biography:
Jessica Hynes (née Stevenson) is a British actress, director and writer. Best known as a comedy actress, she has played Cheryl in The Royle Family (1998–2010), Siobhan Sharpe in Twenty Twelve (2011–2012) and W1A (2014–2017) and Emily Yates in There She Goes (2018–2023). She was also one of the stars, creators and writers of Spaced (1999–2001). She has also had starring roles in television film Tomorrow La Scala! and BBC dramas Years and Years (2019) and Miss Austen (2025). In film, Hynes has appeared in the Bridget Jones (2004–2016), Nativity (2012–2018) and Paddington (2017–2024) film series. Hynes has been nominated for two International Emmy Awards, a Tony Award, a Laurence Olivier Award, five BAFTAs (winning two), three Royal Television Society Awards (winning two) and three British Comedy Awards (winning two).

Hynes was born in Lewisham, London, and grew up in Brighton, where she attended St Luke's Infant and Junior Schools and Dorothy Stringer High School. After her parents split up, she was raised by her mother. She moved back to London as a young adult. Her maternal grandmother came from the village of Llanelian, north Wales, where her uncle also ran a farm. Her mother is a fluent Welsh speaker who later moved back to north Wales. In 2023, Hynes took part in the S4C series Iaith ar Daith where she began to learn the Welsh language; she cited being able to speak Welsh to her mother as a reason why she wanted to take part in the programme. Early in her career, Hynes teamed up with future Spaced co-star Katy Carmichael in a comedy double-act called the Liz Hurleys, appeared in two productions at Sheffield's Crucible Theatre, and acted for television shows including Staying Alive, Six Pairs of Pants, (Un)natural Acts, and Asylum (on which the Spaced team of Hynes, Simon Pegg and Edgar Wright first assembled). From 1998 to 2000, she played the supporting role of Cheryl in the hit sitcom The Royle Family; she reprised the role for special episodes in 2006, 2009 and 2010. In 1999, she co-wrote and starred in Spaced, for which she won two comedy awards and was nominated for an International Emmy and a Bafta for writing and creating the show alongside Simon Pegg. In 2017 , she directed her first feature film, The Fight, produced by Jamie Adams and Unstoppable media. In 2018, she played the role of a mother in the BBC Four programme There She Goes. She stars alongside David Tennant, raising a daughter with a severe learning disability. It is based on the real life of writer Shaun Pye and his wife Sarah Crawford whose daughter was born with a chromosomal disorder. She won a Bafta for her role in the series and was nominated for an International Emmy for her role in '414' the special made in 2023. In 2019, she starred in the BBC and HBO production Years and Years for which she won a Royal Television Society award.
data.name: Jessica Hynes

data.overview: Free Fire là bộ phim hài hành động năm 2016 của đạo diễn Ben Wheatley, do Wheatley và Amy Jump sản xuất. Bộ phim có nội dung kể về cuộc đấu súng vô cùng gam go giữa hai băng nhóm. Mở đầu là cảnh diễn ra một cuộc họp quan trọng trong một nhà kho bỏ hoang tại thành phố Boston của Hoa Kỳ vào năm 1978. Nhưng thực chất đây chỉ là một giao dịch buôn bán vũ khí. Do bất đồng quan điểm, mâu thuẫn từ những người tham gia vào cuộc họp trên đã khiến nơi đây nổ ra một cuộc đọ súng – một trò chơi của sự sống còn.

data.overview: Truyền nhân của “Tiểu Lý Phi Đao” – Lý Hoại (Lưu Khải Uy) dù xuất thân danh môn nhưng phải sống lưu lạc bên ngoài từ nhỏ. Dựa vào tấm họa đồ do mẹ để lại, Lý Hoại đã luyện thành tuyệt học võ công và tìm ra được một kho báu chứa đầy vàng. Lúc này, anh trở lại quê nhà để theo đuổi lý tưởng và tình yêu, đồng thời tìm lại người bạn thanh mai trúc mã Phương Khả Khả (Ngô Ánh Khiết). Mọi chuyện trở nên rắc rối khi anh bị tình nghi có liên can đến số vàng bị mất trong cung. Tiết Thái Nguyệt – Nguyệt Thần (Dương Dung) vốn phụng mệnh triều đình đã bắt Lý Hoại, thế nhưng cô lại đem lòng yêu anh. Mối tình oan nghiệt này đã dẫn đến một kết cục đau thương khi cả hai phải quyết chiến với nhau. Phi đao hựu kiến phi đao được đầu tư nhiều ở khâu kỹ xảo. Vũ khí và những cảnh chiến đấu trong phim đều được thêm các hiệu ứng đặc biệt, lột tả một cách tinh tế nét tinh hoa, huyền diệu của võ thuật Trung Quốc. Đây là điểm khác biệt của Phi đao hựu kiến phi đao với các dòng phim võ hiệp trước đây.

data.biography:
Né en 1958 à Paris, Gilbert Melki grandit auprès de ses parents et de son frère. Après des études vite abandonnées en ébénisterie, Gilbert Melki décide de réaliser son rêve d'enfant et de se lancer dans la comédie. Il n'a que 20 ans lorsqu'il cède à cette pulsion et s'inscrit à plusieurs cours de théâtre à la fois.

Il fait ses premiers pas en 1992 dans le long métrage Betty de Claude Chabrol. C’est cinq ans plus tard que Gilbert parvient à obtenir le rôle qui fait basculer sa carrière : Patrick Abitbol dans La vérité si je mens ! de Thomas Gilou. Il se fait connaître du grand public et profite de l'immense succès dont jouit le film. Il reprend d'ailleurs son rôle dans les deux volets suivants, en 2001 et en 2012. Sa carrière est lancée, les rôles ne cessent de se multiplier pour lui. Il joue sous la direction de réalisateurs de renom tels qu'Antoine de Caunes dans Les Morsures de l'aube, André Téchiné dans Les temps qui changent, ou encore Luc Besson dans Angel-A.

Il double également des personnages de dessins animés tels que Comme chiens et chats de Lawrence Guterman, et joue pour le petit écran dans la série télévisée Kaboul Kitchen, diffusée depuis 2012 sur la chaîne Canal+.

Французский актёр. Племянник актёра Клода Мелки («Акробат»). Кинодебют Мелки состоялся в 1992 году: он исполнил небольшую роль в фильме «Бетти».

Известность пришла к нему в 1997 году благодаря комедии Тома Жилу «Рецепт от бедности».
data.name: Жильбер Мелки

data.overview: Trong cuộc truy bắt tướng Yang, tên cầm đầu một đội quân khủng bố nguy hiểm, người cấp trên mà Pe Deaw kính trọng nhất đã hy sinh. Sau nhiệm vụ lần đó, Pe Deaw xin nghỉ phép, cùng cô em gái theo đoàn công tác xã hội của nhóm vận động viên thể dục - thể thao đến thăm làng Pantong. Không ngờ, ngôi làng đột ngột bị bao vây bởi một nhóm khủng bố hùng hậu, tự xưng là quân đội dưới trướng tướng Yang. Chúng lập đài quan sát, phong toả toàn bộ ngôi làng, buộc chính phủ phải thả tướng Yang. Điều kiện trao đổi là mạng sống của tất cả người dân trong làng. Đồng thời, chúng bí mật lập trình cho một tên lửa hạt nhân phóng thẳng đến đích là thủ đô Bangkok, hòng huỷ diệt hoàn toàn bộ mặt của Thái Lan… Không thể đứng nhìn những người dân vô tội lần lượt bị thiệt mạng, Pe Deaw đã chiến đấu bằng tất cả bản năng của mình, quyết không để một người nào nữa phải chết…
data.title: Sinh Ra Để Chiến Đấu

Born to an Australian father and Chinese mother Joyce Mina Godenzi is a model who moved into acting after winning the 1984 Miss Hong Hong pageant.

She was scouted by legendary martial arts actor/director Sammo Hung, who showcased her beauty and screen presence in a slew of films, most notably his 1987 masterpiece EASTERN CONDORS.

She and Hung married in 1995 and she is now very active in the Jehovah's Witnesses.

高丽虹出生于中国香港，中澳混血，中国香港女演员。

高丽虹曾就读何东中学。1984年参与香港小姐竞选并获得冠军。1986年，加入电影圈拍摄电影，期间因仰慕洪金宝而日久生情。

高丽虹曾凭电影《东方秃鹰》获得第7届香港电影金像奖最佳女配角提名，她在该片中饰演柬埔寨游击队大姐头，凭着敏捷的身手建立动作片女演员的形象。她是极少数能够主打动作片的港姐冠军。

1995年与动作演员洪金宝结婚，之后很少参与演出。1997年，客串出演洪金宝执导，成龙领衔主演的喜剧动作电影《一个好人》。
data.name: 高丽虹

1995 年與動作演員洪金寶結婚，之後很少參與演出。1997 年，客串出演洪金寶執導，成龍領銜主演的喜劇動作電影《一個好人》。

data.biography:
Ivan Kaye is internationally best known for his role as King Aelle in Vikings (2013-17). More recently, he has appeared as the goon leader Yankee in Gunpowder Milkshake (2021).

Kaye has been interested in acting from early childhood. A remarkably versatile actor, he already had a successful stage career in London's West End in dramatic and musical theatre before starting his work in television and film in his early thirties.

Since the beginning of the 1990s, he has been featured in over 50 roles in TV and film. Due to his enormous versatility, Ivan Kaye has been featured in a wide array of roles encompassing lead and main parts as well as antagonists, outright villains, and comical characters.

Recent major productions and roles include: drug baron Polo Yakur in Assassination Games (2011), the Duke of Milan Ludovico Sforza in The Borgias (2011-2013), Joshua Collins (father of the main character played by Johnny Depp) in Dark Shadows (2012), Ivar the Boneless in Hammer of the Gods (2013), King Aelle of Northumbria in Vikings (2013-2017), pub landlord Mick Sturrock in The Coroner (2015-2016) and goon leader Yankee in Gunpowder Milkshake (2021). All of these productions have reached an international audience and have been dubbed in several languages.

Kaye has also appeared in Layer Cake (2004) and is well-known in the UK as herdsman Bryan in BBC’s comedy series The Green Green Grass.

From October 2017 to January 2018 he returned to theatre after almost twenty years, starring as Tom Kettle in the critically acclaimed multi-award-winning stage play The Ferryman at the Gielgud Theatre London.

Kaye has also worked as a voice artist in several video games such as Star Wars The Old Republic, Stuntman, C-12 and more.

As a founder and director of Comedy Ink Productions together with actor/writer Douglas McFerran, he has produced and acted as a lead in short comedic offerings such as the mini-series Brilliant! (2007), the short film Sherlock Holmes Confidential (2013) and his recent dark comedy short Acter (2020).

Kaye has a reputation of being especially kind and appreciative towards his fans on social media and in person. He is a supporter of the Hounslow Urban Farm (where 'Green Green Grass' was partially filmed) and, with several other actors, the Justice for Andrew campaign, seeking justice for the murder of a young Liverpudlian. He has two grown-up daughters and lives in London.
data.name: Ivan Kaye

data.biography:
Lisa Ann Walter (born August 3, 1963) is an American actress, comedian, and television producer, best known for her roles as Chessy the housekeeper in the romantic comedy film The Parent Trap (1998) and Melissa Schemmenti on the Peabody Award-winning ABC mockumentary sitcom Abbott Elementary (2021–present), for which she received a Screen Actors Guild Award for Outstanding Ensemble in a Comedy Series.

She was formerly the creator and executive producer of Oxygen network reality weight-loss competition series, Dance Your Ass Off. Her other reality television work includes her stint as a judge on ABC's reality television series The Next Best Thing: Who Is the Greatest Celebrity Impersonator?, and as winning celebrity editions of the game shows The Weakest Link and Jeopardy! She also created and starred in the 1996–1997 sitcom, Life's Work, and appeared in such films as Bruce Almighty, Shall We Dance, and War of the Worlds.
data.name: Lisa Ann Walter

data.biography: Lisa Ann Walter (née le 3 août 1963) est une actrice, comédienne, écrivain et productrice de cinéma américaine. Elle a joué dans des films tels que la version 1998 de À nous quatre, Bruce tout-puissant, Shall We Dance et La Guerre des mondes. Lisa Ann Walter a également créé et joué dans la courte sitcom de 1996-1997, Life's Work.

丽莎·安·沃尔特（Lisa Ann Walter，1963年8月3日-），美国女演员、喜剧演员、作家和电影制片人。她曾出演过 1998 年版的《父母陷阱》、《全能布鲁斯》、《我们跳舞吧》和《世界大战》等电影，饰演谢丽尔。沃尔特还创作并主演了 1996-1997 年短命的情景喜剧《Life's Work》。她是 ABC 真人秀电视连续剧《下一个最好的事情：谁是最伟大的名人模仿者》的评委。她还在名人版的《最薄弱的环节》中为她的慈善事业赢得了胜利。
